case_title: DABEK CARLOS VS NORTH AMERICAN BURGLARY AND FIRE ALARM COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY DABEK CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN BURGLARY AND FIRE ALARM COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
